channel.title: Backpropagation on Camille's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Backpropagation on Camille's Blog

item.title: Gradient Descent
item.description: function resizeIframe(iframe) { iframe.height = iframe.contentWindow.document.body.scrollHeight + "px"; } Your browser can not display embedded frames. You can access the embedded page via the following link: https://losslandscape.com/explorer
